top_signals.title: Traders See Conflicting Iran Signals on US-Iran Deal
top_signals.summary: Eric Weiner, Bloomberg News senior editor for equities Americas and Sarah Hunt, chief market strategist at Alpine Saxon Woods, break down muted market reaction to Iran peace negotiations as oil remains high with the future of MidEast shipping lanes uncertain.  (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Understanding the Value of Ukrainian Railways
top_signals.summary:
Welcome to The Ukraine Compass, a weekly digest of Ukrainian commentary and analysis from across the political spectrum only for War on the Rocks members. Each Monday, we bring you a curated selection of articles from Ukrainian media offering insight into how Ukrainians themselves debate the issues shaping their country.American coverage often narrows the view to the battlefield — these pieces widen it, revealing the texture of daily life, politics, and public argument in a nation at war. The perspectives gathered here are varied, candid, and often surprising, together forming a more complete picture of Ukraine as it really is.Frontline and StrategyЦензор.НЕТ —

The post Understanding the Value of Ukrainian Railways appeared first on War on the Rocks.

top_signals.title: Russia just passed a law allowing its central bank to down drones
top_signals.summary: Russia's State Duma has passed a law allowing certain financial institutions to operate anti-drone defense systems after attacks on its territory.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Crypto Long & Short: How the GENIUS Act repriced bitcoin's monetary premium
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Gold price falls to two-month low on inflation fears
top_signals.summary: Spot gold dropped as much as 2% to just above $4,400 an ounce, its lowest since March 27.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: LSI Industries Enters Into Strategic Partnership With Carter Thermal Industries Group, Expands Refrigeration Solutions Offering
top_signals.summary: LSI Industries Inc. (Nasdaq: LYTS, “LSI” or the “Company”), a leading U.S. based manufacturer of commercial lighting and display solutions, today announced a strategic partnership (the “Partnership”) with privately held Carter Thermal Industries Group (“Carter”), a global leader in refrigeration and environmental controls solutions. Under the terms of the agreement, LSI will become the exclusive [...]

top_signals.title: Aztec Labs acquires ZKPassport, pledges to keep privacy protocol and iOS mobile app open-source
top_signals.summary: The Obsidion team, including co-founders Michael Elliot and Theo Madzou, will join Aztec Labs to continue developing ZKPassport.
